known_facts: Separately, field reports indicate that ProBook and Enterprise Laptop Series units shipped with System Firmware versions
items.source_excerpt: Separately, field reports indicate that ProBook and Enterprise Laptop Series units shipped with System Firmware versions in the 8.1.x line may report inaccurate battery health percentages following extended sleep cycles. While this does not affect charging safety, IT administrators managing large laptop fleets may wish to prioritize the firmware refresh for these device classes during the v6.4.2 maintenance cycle rather than treating it as a routine, lower-priority update.
items.recommended_action: Phase 9 human review required before rule can progress to validated state

known_facts: EdgeStation Workstations require NIC Firmware 4.2.0 or later when deployed with Platform Driver Pack 12.5.0. This requir
items.source_excerpt: EdgeStation Workstations require NIC Firmware 4.2.0 or later when deployed with Platform Driver Pack 12.5.0. This requirement does not apply to ProBook Series, Enterprise Laptop Series, or ComputeNode Servers, which do not ship with the same onboard NIC controller and are exempt from this requirement.
items.recommended_action: Phase 9 human review required before rule can progress to validated state

known_facts: Field Note (Engineering): Several EdgeStation fleets running Enterprise OS 2025.2 have continued operating on Driver Pac
items.source_excerpt: Field Note (Engineering): Several EdgeStation fleets running Enterprise OS 2025.2 have continued operating on Driver Pack 12.4.2 without reported incident and may defer the 12.5.0 upgrade until their next scheduled maintenance window, pending formal certification.
